about.heading: About SelfMap
about.whatBody: SelfMap was founded by a Projector who loves Human Design, dedicated to helping people understand Human Design and discover their gifts in daily life.
about.techBody: SelfMap uses Swiss Ephemeris as its calculation core, running planetary position calculations in the browser via WebAssembly for precise charts. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, data stored in PostgreSQL.
about.privacyBody: Your birth data is used solely for chart calculation and will never be used for advertising or third-party analytics. Account data is securely managed through Clerk, and chart data is encrypted.
about.contactBody: For any questions or suggestions, feel free to reach us at 112182ssss@gmail.com. SelfMap is under active development — app support and advanced features may be added in the future.
about.disclaimerBody: The Human Design information and interpretations provided on this site are for reference purposes only and are not a substitute for personal consultations with a qualified Human Design analyst. For in-depth and comprehensive chart readings, we recommend seeking guidance from a certified or formally trained Human Design professional. SelfMap assumes no responsibility for any decisions or outcomes arising from the use of content on this site.

hdPage.heading: Understanding Human Design
hdPage.whatBody: Human Design is an integrative system combining astrology, the I Ching, Kabbalah Tree of Life, Indian chakra system, and quantum physics, received by Ra Uru Hu in 1987 in Ibiza, Spain. It generates a unique Body Graph based on your birth date, time, and location.
hdPage.manifestorDesc: ~9%, has energy to initiate action; strategy is to Inform.
hdPage.generatorDesc: ~37%, has sustained sacral energy; strategy is to Respond.
hdPage.projectorDesc: ~20%, skilled at guiding others; strategy is to Wait for the Invitation.
hdPage.reflectorDesc: ~1%, reflects the environment like the moon; strategy is to Wait a Lunar Cycle.
hdPage.gatesBody: The Body Graph consists of 9 energy centers, 36 channels, and 64 gates, corresponding to the 64 hexagrams of the I Ching. When two gates connect to form a complete channel, the centers they link become 'defined' — your stable energy sources.
hdPage.howBody: Enter your birth data in SelfMap to get a full Human Design analysis, including Type, Authority, Profile, defined centers, and personal theme — helping you understand your nature and decision-making style.

account.avatarUploadFailed: Upload failed, please ensure avatar upload is enabled in Clerk

drawer.integrationLead: Four gates and four channels form a closed energy loop. This is the circuit of pure individuality — strong selfhood, instant intuition, immediate action.
drawer.integrationNote: This loop appears in the chart as a trunk (20-57) plus two vertical spurs (gates 10 & 34). All four channels share the same visual structure, so clicking any segment opens this Integration Channels panel.
drawer.crossGateNotFound: Cross content for this gate is not yet available.
